decisions.rationale: Observation's base_record_id entity_nyc-dot is the canonical registry record for the New York City Department of Transportation (entity_name matches, entity_type matches as 'agency'). The do_not_merge_pairs confirm this record is distinct from commissioner/person records like entity_commissioner-polly-trottenberg-tsp-2017 and entity_nycdot-commissioner-mike-flynn. Observation already resolves to its correct canonical record; no different target record to link to.

evidence_refs.source_quote: The logo for the New York City Department of Transportation (NYC DOT)

decisions.rationale: Observation's base_record_id entity_mta-nyct is the canonical registry record for MTA New York City Transit (entity_name matches, entity_type matches as 'agency'). The do_not_merge_pairs confirm entity_mta-nyct is distinct from the parent MTA authority (entity_mta-entity-update-2025, entity_mta-2019) and from person records. Observation already resolves to its correct canonical record.

Observation's base_record_id entity_nypd is the canonical registry record for the New York City Police Department (entity_name matches, entity_type matches as 'government agency'). The canonical record's aliases already include entity_nypd-2011-04-27 showing this observation source is already known. Observation already resolves to its correct canonical record.
